query: motion blur photograph long exposure subject in motion
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / intentional_blur: motion blur, long exposure subject motion - artistic streaks and dynamic blur

response.objective_caption: A figure wearing a flowing, light-colored garment stands in an indistinct space, the fabric draping loosely over the body with vertical folds extending toward the lower portion of the frame.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A heavily blurred figure in a flowing, light-colored garment dissolves into soft streaks and smeared tones, the intentional motion blur and extreme soft focus erasing facial features, limbs, and environmental details into a ghostly abstraction rendered in muted, faded sepia tones that evoke a dreamlike, ethereal presence.
